title: Arrival at Field Station Alpha
summary: Get your bearings, inspect the dock, and learn the basics of survival.

lines.speaker: Dispatcher
lines.text: Field Station Alpha is yours now. Try not to let the fungus win.

lines.speaker: Ranger
lines.text: That feels like a low bar and a deeply unfair amount of responsibility.

title: At the Dock
summary: The station boat is still functional, which already counts as a miracle.

lines.speaker: Ranger
lines.text: Still floating. Great. Let's never ask why.

title: Breeding Lab Notes
summary: Controlled wildlife breeding is risky, useful, and morally murky.

lines.speaker: Old Notes
lines.text: Trait inheritance remains inconsistent. Additives help. Sometimes too much.

title: Fungal Threat
summary: The glow in the grove is beautiful right up until it starts moving.

lines.speaker: Ranger
lines.text: That is either scenic or medically catastrophic.
